title: Trimming Shop 100gm Lilac Purple Shredded Tissue Paper, Decorative Gift Packaging Hamper Filler, Soft Dust free Paper Shreds for Hampers, Baskets & Boxes Stuffing, Weddings, Birthday & Christmas
features: 𝐃𝐄𝐂𝐎𝐑𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐇𝐑𝐄𝐃𝐃𝐄𝐃 𝐓𝐈𝐒𝐒𝐔𝐄 𝐏𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐑: Our multicolour shredded tissue paper is the perfect filler for hampers, baskets & gift boxes. It provides protective cushioning while adding a stylish touch, making your gifts look elegant & well-presented for any occasion.

𝐆𝐑𝐀𝐃𝐄-𝐐𝐔𝐀𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋: Made from soft & durable shredded tissue, this hamper filling is eco-friendly, recyclable & reusable. Its lightweight design ensures it keeps items safe while giving your packaging a professional, luxurious appearance.

𝐄𝐍𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄𝐒 𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: This shredded hamper stuffing elevates gift packaging by filling empty spaces, preventing movement & giving a neat, voluminous look. Ideal for birthdays, weddings, Christmas, Easter baskets, parties & festive celebrations.

𝐌𝐔𝐋𝐓𝐈-𝐏𝐔𝐑𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐄 𝐔𝐒𝐀𝐆𝐄: Perfect for hampers, baskets, boxes, crafts & decorative displays. Whether you’re creating professional gift packaging, party favors or seasonal decor, this shredded paper filler is versatile & easy to use for all occasions.

𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐄 & 𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐊 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎: Includes 100g of multicolour shredded tissue paper, neatly packed & ready to use. Lightweight, easy to fluff & spread inside hampers or boxes for the best presentation. Also available in multiple colours to suit your gift theme.
description: Product Description Is this shredded tissue paper safe? Yes, our shredded tissue paper is recyclable & reusable, making it a sustainable choice for gift packaging, hampers & boxes. Can I use this tissue paper for hampers & gift boxes? Absolutely, this hamper filling is ideal for gift boxes, baskets, hampers & packaging, adding cushioning while enhancing the overall look. What occasions is this shredded paper suitable for? It’s perfect for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, Christmas hampers, Easter baskets, parties & festive decorations, making your gifts look elegant. Does this shredded paper come in other colours? Yes, our shredded tissue paper is available in multiple colours including white, black, red, turquoise, purple & green and many more, so you can match it with any theme or event. Does the color transfer onto products? No, the tissue paper is made using colorfast dye, designed to prevent color transfer under normal dry conditions. Avoid direct contact with moisture.
